synopsis:
Issue 2 of 8 from the Marvel Comics The Mandalorian Season 2 Adaptation
THE PASSENGER!
The Mandalorian must ferry a passenger with precious cargo on a dangerous journey. STEVEN CUMMINGS (CRIMSON REIGN, HIDDEN EMPIRE) joins RODNEY BARNES for issue #2 of this galaxy-spanning series!
title: The Mandalorian: Season 2 #2
